sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2756" key="ai)thmatiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αἰτ-ηματικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n2756.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">disposed to ask</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:4:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
